name: material-organizer
description: Local material capture and knowledge organization app.

scripts.pack:mac: npm run browsers:install && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dir --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run browsers:install && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:signed: npm run browsers:install && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run browsers:install && electron-builder --win nsis zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run browsers:install && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --x64 --publish never
scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/utils.js && node --check src/router.js && node --check src/ai-client.js && node --check src/capture-utils.js && node --check src/item-store.js && node --check src/reliability.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check desktop/main.js && node --check scripts/service.js && node --check scripts/install-playwright-browsers.js && node --check scripts/cleanup-stale-flags.js && node --check scripts/report-teams-title-mismatches.js
